ogTitle: Middle Cove vs Middle Dural: Climate Safety

heading: Middle Cove vs Middle Dural — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Middle Cove, New South Wales and Middle Dural, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middle Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Middle Dural (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Middle Cove or Middle Dural safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Middle Cove has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Middle Dural scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Middle Cove scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Middle Dural scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Middle Cove or Middle Dural?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middle Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
